segments.text: Oh my goodness, if you got the spike, you would have got the stock there.
Atreus going to get a second chance here on this first stock because that down air is sending outwards.
Juggle situation, the up air, and Atreus, this time game number two.

full_text: Oh my goodness, if you got the spike, you would have got the stock there. Atreus going to get a second chance here on this first stock because that down air is sending outwards. Juggle situation, the up air, and Atreus, this time game number two.
